title: Optimize split-packages large-schema build performance to threshold
description: Final validation artifact (entc/integration/benchmark/artifacts/large-schema-final-validation.json) shows build wall -0.74% and build peak RSS +5.40% improvement vs baseline, below the required >=35% thresholds. Additional refactor work is needed to move substantial compile-heavy logic out of the root compat package.
acceptance_criteria: - Build wall median improves by >=35% vs committed baseline\n- Build peak RSS median improves by >=35% vs committed baseline\n- Validation script passes without threshold override

title: Split ent codegen into package-per-type with compat facade
description: Implement package-per-type generation with a thin compatibility facade, preserve existing API in compat mode, and enable native split mode migration.
acceptance_criteria:
- Feature-gated split codegen implemented
- Compat mode preserves current API/import usage
- Native mode available with migration mapping
- Large-schema benchmark meets target gains

title: Add cycle/parity/thin-facade validation gates
description: Add checks for import cycles, legacy-vs-compat parity, and facade-size/facade-logic guardrails.
acceptance_criteria: - CI check detects import cycles\n- Parity tests cover legacy and compat\n- Guardrail fails when facade exceeds policy

title: Implement native split mode and migration mapping
description: Enable SplitMode=native output and generate migration mapping from compat API locations to native package locations.
acceptance_criteria: - Native mode builds successfully\n- Migration map generated and versioned\n- Optional compatibility shims documented

title: Run final performance validation against large schema
description: Run final benchmark comparison and verify acceptance thresholds for both RAM and build-time improvements.
acceptance_criteria: - Peak RSS improved by >=35% vs baseline\n- Build wall time improved by >=35% vs baseline\n- Results recorded in summary artifact

title: Baseline large-schema generation/build benchmark harness
description: Add repeatable baseline measurement for codegen time, go build wall time, and peak RSS against the large schema fixture.
acceptance_criteria: - Benchmark commands committed\n- Baseline artifact produced\n- Metrics include generation time, build time, peak RSS

title: Add split feature flag and generation mode scaffold
description: Introduce FeatureSplitPackages and SplitMode (legacy/compat/native), and wire template/generation selection while preserving legacy default behavior.
acceptance_criteria: - Feature flag and mode config added\n- Legacy output unchanged when split disabled\n- Generator selects split path when enabled

title: Generate per-type internal split packages
description: Implement internal/split/type/<entity> generation for model/query/create/update/delete/mutation internals with acyclic dependencies.
acceptance_criteria: - Per-type internal packages generated\n- No direct sibling type-package imports in internals\n- Split-enabled build succeeds

title: Implement thin bridge/facade for cross-type typed traversal
description: Generate bridge layer and root compat facade for cross-type typed edge methods and public symbol forwarding while keeping heavy logic out of root.
acceptance_criteria: - Cross-type typed APIs available via bridge/facade\n- Compat mode keeps existing public symbols usable\n- Facade contains aliases/forwarders only

title: Isolate EntQL generation into split internal package
description: Move EntQL generation output into internal split package and expose only required compatibility entrypoints in compat mode.
acceptance_criteria: - EntQL heavy code isolated from root package\n- Compat behavior remains equivalent\n- EntQL-enabled builds pass

title: Split ent codegen into package-per-type with compat facade
description: Implement package-per-type generation with a thin compatibility facade, preserve existing API in compat mode, and enable native split mode migration.
acceptance_criteria:
- Feature-gated split codegen implemented
- Compat mode preserves current API/import usage
- Native mode available with migration mapping
- Large-schema benchmark meets target gains
